details.quote: information collected by cookies and similar technologies__, depending on your settings, (cookies, __pixels__ (small graphic data that recognize user activity, such as if and how often a user has visited a website)
details.what_is_tracked: user activity, such as if and how often a user has visited a website

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Welcome to Snap Inc.’s Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Welcome to Snap Inc.’s Privacy Policy. This Policy explains how we collect and use your data and how you can control your information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Welcome to Snap Inc.’s Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Have any questions about the information here or wish to contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO)? You can contact us __here__.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: account details__ (information about you, like your name, username, email address, birthday, and phone number). When you set up your profile, you’ll also provide us with __profile details__ (like your Bitmoji and profile picture). If you use our commerce products to buy something, like those latest sneakers, we may ask you for __payment and related information__ (like your physical address, so we can ship the product to you, payment information, so we can process the payment, and transaction history).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Some jurisdictions require that we state our legal basis for processing data for particular purposes. You can find that information here.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Many of our Services require you to set up an account. To do this, we ask you to provide us with __account details__ (information about you, like your name, username, email address, birthday, and phone number).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: As a general rule, we keep information as long as you tell us to, and otherwise as long as we need it to provide our Services, or as required by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Recipients & Reasons for Sharing: Snapchat, Family Center Participants, Public, Third-Party Apps, Service Providers, Business and Integrated Partners, Anti-Fraud Partners, Legal, Safety, and Security Partners, Affiliates, For the purposes of a Merger or Acquisition.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We use algorithms and __machine learning models__ for personalization, advertising, safety and security, fairness and inclusivity, augmented reality, and to prevent abuse or other Terms of Service violations.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We use your information to enhance the safety and security of our Services, verify Snapchatter identity, and prevent fraud or other unauthorized or illegal activity.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The last category of data we collect is information about you that we may receive from others, such as other users, our affiliates, and third parties.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: if another Snapchatter uploads their contact list which includes your information, we may combine that with other information we have about you to better understand who you may want to communicate with.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Access and update your information. You can access and edit most of your basic account information right in our Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Download your data. You can make a request in our Download My Data tool to export a copy of your Snapchat information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Delete your information. If you want to delete your account, learn how here.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Object to processing. Depending on where you live and the particular data we are processing, you may have the right to object to our processing of that information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Download your data. You can make a request in our Download My Data tool to export a copy of your Snapchat information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Object to processing. Depending on where you live and the particular data we are processing, you may have the right to object to our processing of that information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: A note about __information collected by cookies and other technologies__: we may use these technologies to collect information when you interact with Services we offer through one of our partners.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Welcome to Snap Inc.’s Privacy Policy.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: we may use these technologies to collect information when you interact with Services we offer through one of our partners. For example, we may use information collected on an advertiser’s website to show you more relevant ads.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: We maintain a list of categories of service providers here.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: we may use information collected on an advertiser’s website to show you more relevant ads.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: cookies, __pixels__ (small graphic data that recognize user activity, such as if and how often a user has visited a website), web storage, unique advertising identifiers

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We perform analytics in order to identify, monitor, and analyze trends and usage.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: We may collect your personal information from, transfer it to, and store and process it in the United States or other countries outside of where you live.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: account details (information about you, like your name, username, email address, birthday, and phone number)
identite.purpose: Création et gestion du compte utilisateur

contact.quote: email address, phone number, physical address, so we can ship the product to you
contact.purpose: Coordonnées pour la communication, la livraison et la gestion du compte

compte_auth.quote: account details (information about you, like your name, username, email address, birthday, and phone number)
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion du compte utilisateur

paiement.quote: payment and related information (like your physical address, so we can ship the product to you, payment information, so we can process the payment, and transaction history)
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements et gestion des transactions

localisation.quote: location information (IP address), precise location through methods like GPS signals
localisation.purpose: Géolocalisation pour personnalisation et fonctionnalités comme Snap Map

appareil_technique.quote: device information (such as your hardware or software, operating system, device memory, advertising identifiers, apps installed, browser type, information from device sensors that measure the motion of your device or compasses and microphones, including whether you have headphones connected, and information about your wireless and mobile connections), information collected by cookies and similar technologies (cookies, pixels (small graphic data that recognize user activity, such as if and how often a user has visited a website), web storage, unique advertising identifiers), and log information (such as details about how you’ve used our Services, access times, pages viewed, IP address, and unique identifiers like cookies)
appareil_technique.purpose: Collecte d'informations techniques pour le fonctionnement, la personnalisation et la sécurité des services

usage_comportement.quote: usage information (information about how you interact with our Services — for example, which Lenses you view and apply, your premium subscriptions, Stories you watch, and how often you interact with other Snapchatters) and content information (information about content you create or provide, your engagement with the camera and creative tools, your interactions with My AI, and metadata — for example, information about the content itself like the date and time it was posted and who viewed it)
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse du comportement utilisateur pour personnalisation et amélioration des services

contenus_utilisateur.quote: content and information about that content, and content you share and generate with our AI Features (content, or “Inputs,” including text, images, video, audio, precise location, and engagement, used to generate content and responses, or “Outputs”)
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus créés par l'utilisateur (Snaps, Chats, Stories, etc.)

communications.quote: private content and communications (like Snaps and Chats with friends, voice and video calls, and content that is saved in My Eyes Only)
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications entre utilisateurs (Snaps, Chats, appels)

contacts_reseau.quote: device phonebook (contacts and related information), contact info from other Snapchatters or third parties (if another Snapchatter uploads their contact list which includes your information, we may combine that with other information we have about you to better understand who you may want to communicate with)
contacts_reseau.purpose: Gestion du carnet d'adresses et des relations sociales

donnees_tiers.quote: linked third-party service data (information we get when you link your Snapchat account to another service), data from advertisers (information from advertisers, app developers, publishers, and other third parties to help target or measure the performance of ads), data relating to potential violations of our Terms (we may receive information from third parties, including website publishers, social network providers, law enforcement, and others, about potential violators of our Terms of Service and Community Guidelines)
donnees_tiers.purpose: Données obtenues via des tiers pour la personnalisation, la publicité et la sécurité

mineurs.quote: If we have actual knowledge that you are under the age of 13 (or the minimum age at which a person may use the Services in your state, province, or country without parental consent, if greater), we will stop providing Services to you and delete your account and data
mineurs.purpose: Protection des données des mineurs et conformité légale

legal_bases.data: account details (name, username, email address, birthday, phone number)
legal_bases.quote: Many of our Services require you to set up an account. To do this, we ask you to provide us with account details (information about you, like your name, username, email address, birthday, and phone number)

If you use our commerce products to buy something, like those latest sneakers, we may ask you for payment and related information (like your physical address, so we can ship the product to you, payment information, so we can process the payment, and transaction history)

legal_bases.data: device phonebook, camera, photos, microphone, precise location
legal_bases.quote: If you’ve explicitly granted device-level permissions, device information may also include information about your device phonebook (contacts and related information), images and other information from your device’s camera, photos, and microphone (like the ability to take photos, videos, view stored photos and videos, and access the microphone to record audio while recording video), and location information (precise location through methods like GPS signals)

legal_bases.data: usage information, content information, device information, cookies, log information
legal_bases.quote: When you use our Services, we collect information about which of those Services you’ve used and how you’ve used them. This helps us better understand the way our community uses our Services so that we can make improvements

legal_bases.data: private content and communications (for safety and security)
legal_bases.quote: We use your information to enhance the safety and security of our Services, verify Snapchatter identity, and prevent fraud or other unauthorized or illegal activity

We use the data we collect to enforce our Terms and the law. This includes enforcing, investigating, and reporting conduct that violates our Terms, policies, or the law, responding to requests from law enforcement, and complying with legal requirements
Additionally, there may be instances when you interact with our Services that we will ask your permission to collect additional information

transfers.quote: We may collect your personal information from, transfer it to, and store and process it in the United States or other countries outside of where you live
